mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, role, created_at as createdAt FROM member WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash as passwordHash, role, created_at as createdAt FROM member WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( username, password_hash, role, created_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
